What entities are present and what are they doing when the smartphone is lying on the surface?
canonical_answer: A gold-colored smartphone rests on a white surface with its screen illuminated. The display shows a green lightsaber graphic wallpaper and a status bar reading 3:54 PM. Four app icons appear in a dock at the bottom of the screen. The brand name HUAWEI is visible on the bottom bezel of the device. A watermark text is present in the bottom right corner.

question: Describe what is happening when the user interacts with the smartphone screen.
canonical_answer: Human hands hold the gold smartphone while a finger touches the display. The screen shows a photo gallery application with album lists like Camera and Bluetooth. A floral image appears on the screen with a circular magnification overlay activated by touch. The status bar indicates the time is 3:56 PM during this interaction. Text reading Magazine unlock is visible at the top of the interface.

question: Describe the sequence of graphical elements and text that appear during the introduction.
canonical_answer: At 0s, diagonal light bands transition from white to lime green; at 1s, a green robot icon appears within a square; at 2s, text reading 'IFA 2015' displays in the upper dark section; at 3s, the Android Authority logo centers on the white lower background.

question: Describe the positioning and screen content of the gold smartphone as the video progresses.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a gold smartphone lies flat displaying a green lightsaber wallpaper; at 10s, the screen wallpaper changes to a blue-green light streak; at 16s, the phone stands upright against a cylindrical container; at 18s, the rear fingerprint sensor and Huawei branding become clearly visible.
